description_long: This house features a minimalist, modern design with a predominantly white exterior and clean, geometric lines. The structure is single-story with a flat roof and several extended horizontal elements that may serve as awnings, carports, or patios. Windows are placed asymmetrically, with a few small rectangular openings visible on the sides and rear, and a larger opening at the front, possibly for the main entrance or living area. The house sits on a flat, green plot, suggesting a suburban or urban neighborhood setting. The entryway is defined by a recessed section and a horizontal overhang, providing a sheltered approach. The overall appearance is sleek and functional, with an emphasis on simplicity and open space.
description: A modern, single-story white house with a flat roof, clean lines, and extended horizontal elements, featuring asymmetrical windows and a recessed entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a large opening, horizontal overhangs, and a clear view of the minimalist facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended horizontal elements and small rectangular windows, with the flat roof profile visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two small windows and the continuation of the flat roof and horizontal extensions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the horizontal elements and the simple, unadorned wall surfaces.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a horizontal overhang, minimal detailing, and a large opening.
